_readme: Structured feature tracker. Claude reads and updates this file incrementally. Do not convert to Markdown. Add features here before starting work on them.

features.name: Project scaffold
features.description: Initial repo setup: Vite, React, TanStack Router, TanStack Query, shadcn/ui, Tailwind, TypeScript strict
acceptance: npm run dev starts without errors

features.name: OpenAPI type generation pipeline
features.description: Wire up openapi-typescript to generate src/types/api.ts from openapi.json
acceptance: npm run gen:types runs without errors
No hand-written API types exist in codebase
